Beta Testing
Beta Access · Sandbox Checkout · Real Feedback Only

We need your Honest Eyes.

Snark-A-Tects is getting ready to launch and we want real humans clicking around before we go live. Browse the store, poke at things, try to break it — then tell us what you found. No sugar-coating.

Click Everything ✦ Break It If You Can ✦ Test The Checkout ✦ No Real Charges ✦ Be Brutally Honest ✦ Click Everything ✦ Break It If You Can ✦ Test The Checkout ✦ No Real Charges ✦ Be Brutally Honest ✦
What we're asking you to test
Browse all product categories and filters
Navigate the menu and site structure
Click into individual product pages
Add items to cart and go through checkout
Try it on mobile if you can
Note anything confusing or broken
Visit the Store Opens in a new tab  ·  Use the sandbox card at checkout — no real charges
Then tell us what you found
Drop your feedback

Be Brutal.

Takes about 2 minutes. That's the whole point.
